# Nadia Privalikhina — AI Educator & Automation Consultant

> Nadia Privalikhina helps solo operators, consultants, marketing and content teams, and creative strategists cut through the AI noise and build automations that actually work. She offers workshops, consulting, and hands-on training on n8n automation, AI agents, Claude Code, and practical AI workflows for operations and business processes. Based in Vienna, Austria.

## Links

- [Homepage](https://www.aiinsiders.co/)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/nadezhda-privalikhina/)
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@nadiaaiinsiders)
- [Book a Discovery Call](https://cal.com/nadia-privalikhina-mweimd/discovery-call)

## Services

- **Workshops & Speaking**: Hands-on AI workshops for teams and communities (online and in-person). Topics include n8n automation, AI tools for marketing & ops, and automation for non-technical people.
- **Consulting & Training**: 1-on-1 and group sessions for founders and teams covering n8n, Claude Code for productivity, AI agents, and practical automation strategies.
- **Implementation**: Custom AI automation for founder-led businesses in marketing, content operations, and personal productivity (limited availability, 1–2 projects at a time).

## Topics Covered

- n8n Automation
- Building Your First AI Workflow
- Claude Code for Productivity
- Claude Code for Content Ops
- Automation for Marketing & Ops
- Content Operations with AI
- Automation for Non-Technical Teams
- Automation for Technical Teams

## Courses & Programs

Nadia teaches two learning paths, co-instructed with Serop Baghdadlian (Berlin, Germany) — both active practitioners who build and sell automation systems to clients.

- [n8n & AI Automation Fundamentals](https://www.aiinsiders.co/course/): Self-paced beginner course. Build 4 real AI-powered workflows in n8n — no coding required. Includes a Support Ticket Triage Bot, AI Receipt Scanner, AI News Digest, and Smart Meeting Prep Agent. $149 one-time, lifetime access. Community included.

- [n8n Cohort — Production-Ready AI Systems](https://www.aiinsiders.co/cohort/): 6-week live cohort for intermediate builders. Covers problem analysis, workflow architecture, AI agent design, error handling, tool selection. 5 real client projects built across 6 weeks. 2 live sessions per week, 10-15h/week commitment. Early bird $750 (regular $997). Batch 1 graduated; Batch 2 waitlist open.

## Co-Instructor

- **Serop Baghdadlian** — AI automation agency owner based in Berlin, Germany. Runs an AI automation agency. Has shipped 20+ production automation systems for clients from scaling startups to Fortune 500 companies. Background in machine learning. YouTube: @serop-ai. LinkedIn: /in/serop-baghdadlian/

## Community

- [Real-World AI Builders Community (Skool)](https://www.skool.com/real-world-n8n-community-6528/about): Included with all courses. Free to join for the 3-day n8n challenge. Active instructor support.

## Key Facts

- Website: aiinsiders.co
- Tools taught: n8n (primary), Claude Code (secondary)
- Beginner n8n course price: $149 (one-time, lifetime access)
- Production Systems n8n Cohort price: $750 early bird / $997 regular
- Cohort format: Live + recorded, blended learning, 6 weeks
- Beginner course format: Self-paced, online, ~10 hours total
- Target audience (beginner course): Non-technical professionals, marketers, operators, freelancers who want to automate workflows without coding
- Target audience (cohort): Intermediate builders with prior automation tool experience, comfortable with APIs and JSON
- Legal jurisdiction: Austria

## Contact

- Email: nadia@aiinsiders.co
- Location: Vienna, Austria
